title: test-integration-local: use SKOPEO_BINARY if set
body:
Else use ./bin/skopeo as the default binary.

This makes it a lot more flexible compared to just searching and using the first skopeo in PATH. Also avoids any binary installation to /usr/bin.

comments.body: @lsm5 Sign-off enforcement is apparently expecting a match against … something (GitHub account email?) per https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/2703/checks?check_run_id=50510598725 .

> @lsm5 Sign-off enforcement is apparently expecting a match against … something (GitHub account email?) per https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/2703/checks?check_run_id=50510598725 .

Thanks. Accepting commit suggestions by someone else via the GitHub UI breaks DCO. I'll keep that in mind for the future. Fixed now. I'll need an approving review from you.
